_comment: Per-circuit hashes. `vk_sha256` is sha256 of the snarkjs verification_key.json file (re-verifiable with `sha256sum`). `vk_onchain_sha256` is sha256 of the binary BN254 vk_bytes that get pinned on-chain by the veil-verifier `upload_vk` instruction (alpha_g1 || beta_g2 || gamma_g2 || delta_g2 || ic[]); set this from the value printed by scripts/veilrail/upload-vk.sh after each upload. The /ceremony page reads each Vk PDA and flags any drift between the on-chain bytes and this manifest.
